mapper.select: select case when dept_cd = 'ADMIN' then true else false end as is_admin from sys_user where 1=1 and user_id = #{userId} and delete_yn = 'N'

select smar.sys_id , smar.link_sys_id , smar.menu_cd , coalesce(sdmm.depth1_menu_nm, smar.menu_nm) as menu_nm, smar.parent_menu_cd , smar.ord_no , smar.menu_level , null as menu_url, smar.use_yn, smar.reset_yn, smar.new_yn, smar.del_yn, smar.save_yn, smar.print_yn, smar.search_yn from sys_menu_admin_role smar left join sys_depth1_menu_master sdmm on sdmm.depth1_menu_cd = smar.menu_cd where 1=1 and smar.sys_plant_cd = #{userId} and smar.use_yn = 'Y' and smar.menu_level = #{menuLevel} order by smar.ord_no asc

select smar.sys_id , smar.link_sys_id , smar.menu_cd , coalesce(sml.menu_nm, smar.menu_nm) as menu_nm, smar.parent_menu_cd , smar.ord_no , smar.menu_level , null as menu_url, smar.use_yn, smar.reset_yn, smar.new_yn, smar.del_yn, smar.save_yn, smar.print_yn, smar.search_yn from sys_menu_admin_role smar left join sys_depth23_menu sdm on sdm.menu_cd = smar.menu_cd left join sys_menu_list sml on sml.menu_cd = sdm.menu_cd where 1=1 and smar.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} and sdm.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} and sdm.parent_menu_cd = #{menuCd} and use_yn = 'Y' and sdm.menu_level = #{menuLevel} order by ord_no asc

select smar.sys_id , smar.link_sys_id , smar.menu_cd , coalesce(sml.menu_nm, smar.menu_nm) as menu_nm, smar.parent_menu_cd , smar.ord_no , smar.menu_level , sml.menu_url, smar.use_yn, smar.reset_yn, smar.new_yn, smar.del_yn, smar.save_yn, smar.print_yn, smar.search_yn from sys_menu_admin_role smar left join sys_depth23_menu sdm on sdm.menu_cd = smar.menu_cd left join sys_menu_list sml on sml.menu_cd = sdm.menu_cd where 1=1 and smar.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} and sdm.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} and sdm.parent_menu_cd = #{menuCd} and use_yn = 'Y' and sdm.menu_level = #{menuLevel} order by ord_no asc

select smar.sys_id , smar.link_sys_id , smar.menu_cd , coalesce(sdmm.depth1_menu_nm, smar.menu_nm) as menu_nm, smar.parent_menu_cd , smar.ord_no , smar.menu_level , null as menu_url, smar.use_yn, smar.reset_yn, smar.new_yn, smar.del_yn, smar.save_yn, smar.print_yn, smar.search_yn from mas_menu_user_role smar left join sys_depth1_menu_master sdmm on sdmm.depth1_menu_cd = smar.menu_cd where 1=1 and smar.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} and use_yn = 'Y' and menu_level = #{menuLevel} order by ord_no asc

select smar.sys_id , smar.link_sys_id , smar.menu_cd , coalesce(sml.menu_nm, smar.menu_nm) as menu_nm, smar.parent_menu_cd , smar.ord_no , smar.menu_level , null as menu_url, smar.use_yn, smar.reset_yn, smar.new_yn, smar.del_yn, smar.save_yn, smar.print_yn, smar.search_yn from mas_menu_user_role smar left join sys_menu_list sml on sml.menu_cd = smar.menu_cd where 1=1 and smar.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} and parent_menu_cd = #{menuCd} and use_yn = 'Y' and menu_level = #{menuLevel} order by ord_no asc

select smar.sys_id , smar.link_sys_id , smar.menu_cd , coalesce(sml.menu_nm, smar.menu_nm) as menu_nm, smar.parent_menu_cd , smar.ord_no , smar.menu_level , sml.menu_url, smar.use_yn, smar.reset_yn, smar.new_yn, smar.del_yn, smar.save_yn, smar.print_yn, smar.search_yn from mas_menu_user_role smar left join sys_menu_list sml on sml.menu_cd = smar.menu_cd where 1=1 and smar.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} and parent_menu_cd = #{menuCd} and use_yn = 'Y' and menu_level = #{menuLevel} order by ord_no asc
